heading: Adjustments of amount of educational assistance and of subsistence allowance
label: 2145 Adjustments of amount of educational assistance and of subsistence allowance
notes: Amendments1993—Subsec. (b). substituted “has the meaning given the term ‘cost of attendance’ by section 472 of the Higher Education Act of 1965 ()” for “means the actual cost of attendance as determined by the Secretary of Education pursuant to section 411(a)(2)(B)(iv) of the Higher Education Act of 1965 ()”.Pub. amendments: Amendments1993—Subsec. (b). substituted “has the meaning given the term ‘cost of attendance’ by section 472 of the Higher Education Act of 1965 ()” for “means the actual cost of attendance as determined by the Secretary of Education pursuant to section 411(a)(2)(B)(iv) of the Higher Education Act of 1965 ()”.Pub. L. 103–3520 U.S.C. 108720 U.S.C. 1070a(a)(2)(B)(iv)ll1987—Subsec. (b). inserted “the term” after “In this section,”.Pub. L. 100–180

children.label: a
children.text: Once each year, the Secretary of Defense shall adjust the amount of educational assistance which may be provided to any person in any standard academic year under , and the amount of the subsistence allowance authorized under for pursuit of a course of instruction on a full-time basis, in a manner consistent with the change over the preceding twelve-month period in the average actual cost of attendance at public institutions of higher education.section 2143 of this titlesection 2144 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: In this section, the term “actual cost of attendance” has the meaning given the term “cost of attendance” by section 472 of the Higher Education Act of 1965 ().20 U.S.C. 1087ll
